description: You are a Process Engineer at a fertilizer plant. Create a Process Flow Diagram (PFD) for the high-pressure ammonia synthesis loop (Haber-Bosch process) for a safety report, using the process description found in '~/Desktop/process_description.txt'. The diagram must utilize standard engineering symbols and include a Feed Compressor, Pre-heater, Catalytic Reactor, Cooler/Condenser, and High-Pressure Separator connected in sequence, including a recycle loop from the separator top back to the start. Label the streams (e.g., 'N2+H2 Feed', 'Liquid NH3', 'Recycle Gas'). Save the diagram to '~/Desktop/haber_process.drawio' and export it to '~/Desktop/haber_process.png'.
